title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A Fierce Haki CLASH!! _Who Will Prevail...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAAAAHA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WELL PLAYED!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to hand it to you for coming this far...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll never be able to change the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He did it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: he may only be 10 years old...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but that Kaido Kid is the strongest soldier around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm still itching for more!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 46 years ago, the kingdom of vodka

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our nation has no choice but to wage war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The loot we acquire is our only means of paying the celestial tribute.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we fail to do that, we will lose our standing in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do the celestial dragons get to boss you around...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kaido, enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have offered you up for navy enlistment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You want me to be a government dog?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be blunt, our country can't handle you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you hand him over now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are guaranteed a seat at the next reverie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm not a political bargaining chip, Dammit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kaido escaped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We already caught him though!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did he really escape again?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard he gets caught on purpose when he's hungry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A prison ship isn't a buffet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 44 years ago, pirate Island, Fullalead

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's so strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell is this guy?! how can he only be 15?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, brat! You wanna be a pirate?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rocks wants to meet you... What will you do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kaido joined the rocks pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're Unstop- Pable Now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kaido! Come quick, it's important!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're going to God Valley!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
